name: PrivacyMark System
owner: Japan Institute for Promotion of Digital Economy and Community (JIPDEC)
description: Operating since April 1, 1998. Based on JIS Q 15001:2017 (Personal Information Protection Management System - Requirements). Certification issued via JIPDEC or 19 designated assessment bodies; ~17,700+ certified entities as of mid-2026.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/jipdec.or.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Published by a quasi-public body (specially-approved corporation / public-interest incorporated foundation) rather than a national government organ directly -- the Copyright Act Article 13 government-notification exclusion may not extend cleanly to this publisher. Freely readable public web content; citation/reference use is reasonable, but full redistribution status is unconfirmed. Treat as internal working data pending confirmation, consistent with the FISC entry.

current_extraction.notes: Both the JIPDEC and PrivacyMark-branded English overview pages were captured in full as clean text.

scope.notes: Web page content fully captured; no separate downloadable standard document (JIS Q 15001 itself is a paid JSA standard, out of scope here).
